dataset: TR-1 2026 — вагонная составляющая общего парка (Тарифные схемы В1-В15, за один вагон, в рублях), Приложение N 2
verifyNote: Values cross-checked against sudact.ru for В1/В2/В3 (0-5,6-10,11-15,16-20), В1 long-distance (5901-6100=33619, 11701-11900=60408), and axle-split structure (В7-4/В7-8, В15-4/В15-8) — all exact matches. Re-exported from tr1-rate-belts.json[schemesV_belt].
schemeNote: В7 and В15 split by axle count: В7-4/В7-8, В15-4/В15-8 (4-осные / 8-осные). Schemes В1-В6, В8-В14 are single-column.
rateNote: rateRub = за один вагон, в рублях, без НДС. ALREADY 2026-indexed (TR-1 2026 baseline). Distance-belt only (no weight dependence).
beltNote: Distance belts are non-uniform and widen with distance (5km belts in short range, ~200km belts at long range). 127 belts per scheme, 0-11900 km. For an intermediate distance, snap to the published belt containing it.
